# ResonateKit

> One-to-one public speaking and communication coaching led by award-winning theatre director Viesturs Meikšāns. For individuals and teams — online and in person. (English-language sister brand of Runas Skola.)

## Key pages
- [Homepage](https://resonatekit.com/): programs overview — 1:1 coaching, corporate & team training, prepare-for-a-big-talk; coach bio, reviews, FAQ.
- [Corporate Training](https://resonatekit.com/corporate-training/): public speaking & communication training for teams and companies — presentations, storytelling, media training, difficult conversations, Q&A handling.
- [Blog](https://resonatekit.com/blog/): 34 articles on public speaking, overcoming stage fright, storytelling, charisma, body language, presentation skills and communication.

## About the coach
Viesturs Meikšāns — professional theatre and opera director (30+ productions, 15+ years), TEDx Rīga and Forum "Līdere" public-speaking consultant. He coaches individuals and corporate teams to speak clearly, confidently and persuasively.

## Offerings
- 1:1 Coaching — private sessions (€200), online or in person.
- Corporate & team training — workshops and lectures priced per needs (quote on request).
- Contact: hello@resonatekit.com · +371 27 337 711
